summary: Fixed Foreman planner idle activity tracking so every parsed stream event refreshes the idle heartbeat, and raised the default idle timeout to 90s while preserving max-timeout semantics.

extensions/foreman/test/planner_timeout_test.sh - updated default expectations and added source assertion for onLine activity wiring

raw:
## Completed
Implemented the Foreman planner idle-timeout fix. `runAgent` now treats every successfully parsed model stream event as activity, while transcript output remains unchanged. Raised default planner idle timeout to 90s and updated timeout/source assertions.

## Files Changed
- `extensions/foreman/index.ts` - moved activity heartbeat to `onLine` after successful JSON parse.
- `extensions/foreman/planner.ts` - default planner idle timeout `45_000` → `90_000`.
- `extensions/foreman/test/planner_timeout_test.sh` - updated defaults and added source assertion for parsed-event activity wiring.

## How To Verify
`grep -q "claude-opus-4-8:xhigh" extensions/foreman/crew/planner.md && bash extensions/foreman/test/planner_timeout_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/planner_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/gates_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/reviewer_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/guard_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/fallback_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/ledger_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/dashboard/test/reader_test.sh`

## Notes
Verification command passed. Full validation still requires the next live Gate 1 planner run; it should now survive long final reasoning and emit real `---PLAN-JSON---`.

## MACHINE BLOCK (MANDATORY — end your response with this exact block)

  ],
  "howToVerify": "grep -q \"claude-opus-4-8:xhigh\" extensions/foreman/crew/planner.md && bash extensions/foreman/test/planner_timeout_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/planner_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/gates_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/reviewer_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/guard_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/fallback_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/ledger_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/dashboard/test/reader_test.sh"
}
